meaning: adv.不自然地,勉强地,强制地
examples: Very constrainedly, she agreed a young doctor to operate on her.
People pass, black and white, the Negroes frankly participants in the spirit of Spring, the whites laughing constrainedly, awkward in natural emotion.
This paper introduces several typical structures of HCB and expatiate on the principle of naturally current commutating and constrainedly current commutating.
